meaning: n.索具装备,钻探设备,钻探平台,钻塔v.装上索具,配备,装配
examples: It took a team of engineers to rig it up.
The oil slick resulted from an accident at the Deepwater Horizon rig in the Gulf of Mexico.
When the rig sank, the riser broke near the top while remaining attached to the blowout preventer at the bottom.
His 30-foot aluminum rig is full and motoring back toward the dock in Henry, Illinois.
Officials said the trailer disconnected from the rig and slammed into the van, ripping it apart.
